title: Hand Tied Bags (1 Pack, Pink) | Bouquet Bags 19cm x 17cm x 25cm, Florist Porto Bag for Gifting, Party Favors, Crafts, and Special Events
features: Premium Quality Material: Made from durable and eco-friendly natural fibers, these hand-tied bags are sturdy and reusable.
Ideal Size: With dimensions of 19cm W x 17cm D x 25cm H, perfect for holding small to medium gifts, crafts, or party favors.
Handcrafted Design: Each bag is meticulously hand-tied, giving it a unique and artisanal look that enhances any occasion.
Versatile Use: Ideal for weddings, birthdays, baby showers, and other special events; great for gift wrapping, DIY projects, or decorative storage.
Eco-Friendly Choice: Fully biodegradable and compostable, making it an environmentally responsible alternative to plastic bags.
Material: Made of FSC Certified card
Ideal for Florals: The bags can be used for carrying hand-tied bouquets and plants.
Perfect for floral hand tied arrangements, transporting flowers, bouquets, plants, gifts etc.
description: Enhance your gift-giving experience with the Floralcraft Hand Tied Bags. Crafted from high-quality, natural fibers, these bags are both stylish and eco-friendly. They offer ample space for small to medium-sized gifts, crafts, or party favors. Each bag is carefully hand-tied, providing a unique, artisanal touch that makes your gift stand out. Whether you're planning a wedding, birthday, baby shower, or any other special event, these versatile bags are perfect for adding a touch of elegance to your celebration. Beyond their beauty, Floralcraft Hand Tied Bags are an environmentally conscious choice. They are fully biodegradable and compostable, offering a sustainable alternative to traditional plastic gift bags. Choose Floralcraft Hand Tied Bags for a combination of quality, style, and eco-friendliness.
